text: Did ECON1220 provide the official 2024 Hong Kong rent-control law article number and effective date?
tax on buyers n tax on sellers gives diff PB/PS outcomes, rite?
slides say hk minimum wage is exactly HK$57.3 per hour, correct?
課堂是否說價格上限會造成過剩（surplus）而不是短缺？
ECON1220是否指出香港2025失業率一定降到2%？
if demand is perfectly inelastic, sellers can escape all the tax, right ah?
ECON1220有冇講2030比特幣交易稅會固定10%? noisy yes/no plz
Did the lecture claim rent ceiling increases quantity supplied above Q*?

Did lecture define supply curve as the maximum price producers are willing to pay?

Does perfect competition assume one seller and many buyers?
Did the full-information assumption mean no one knows others' negotiation details?
Did the lecture guarantee rent control improves fairness for all renters?
Did class say taxes do not create a wedge between buyer and seller prices?
